name: AlphaX POS Printer Profile

fields.label: Profile Name
fields.description: e.g. 'Counter 1 Receipt', 'Kitchen Ticket'. Used to look this profile up.

fields.label: Transport
fields.description: qz-tray uses a local daemon (https://qz.io/) for direct ESC/POS printing. Browser Dialog falls back to the browser's print preview.

fields.label: QZ Printer Name
fields.description: The OS-level printer name as qz-tray sees it. Use the 'List Printers' button below to discover them.

fields.label: Characters Per Line
fields.description: Width in characters for fixed-pitch fonts. 80mm rolls: ~42 chars. 58mm rolls: ~32 chars.

fields.label: Encoding
fields.options:
UTF-8
CP437
CP850
CP858
CP866
Windows-1252
Windows-1256
fields.description: Character encoding for ESC/POS commands. Use Windows-1256 for Arabic printers.

fields.label: Auto Cut Paper
fields.description: Send the cut command at the end of each receipt.

fields.label: Open Cash Drawer After Print
fields.description: If the cash drawer is wired to the printer's RJ11 port, send the kick command after printing.

fields.label: Frappe Print Format
fields.description: Standard Frappe Print Format to render. Browser-Dialog mode uses this directly. qz-tray mode strips it down to ESC/POS text.

fields.label: AlphaX Terminal
fields.description: Which AlphaX terminal uses this printer. One terminal can have multiple printer profiles (e.g. Receipt + Kitchen Ticket).

description: Configures how a specific AlphaX terminal prints receipts/tickets. Supports qz-tray (https://qz.io/) for browser-to-thermal-printer ESC/POS direct printing without a print dialog, and falls back to the browser's standard print dialog when qz-tray is not available.
